Confidential Term Sheet – Proposed Murabaha Financing and Majority Acquisition of Altahadi Manufacturing LLC by Rimal Industries Company (a Tadawul-listed joint stock company).
Parties: Rimal Industries Company (CR 101-8899123-0), issuer; Nourah Capital Finance Company (CR 701-5544332-1), financier; Altahadi Manufacturing LLC (CR 205-7788991-4), target.
Consideration: SAR 180,000,000 for 60% stake; financing: SAR 120,000,000 Shari’ah-compliant Murabaha, profit rate SAIBOR + 210 bps, tenor 5 years, security over target shares and selected receivables.
Materiality/Disclosure: Estimated at ~8.2% of Issuer’s consolidated assets (1447H audit); treated as material; announcement on the Saudi Exchange required promptly per CMA Rules on the Offer of Securities and Continuing Obligations.
Public vs non-public: Issuer’s non-binding MoU regarding a prospective industrial acquisition was announced on the Saudi Exchange website on 1448/02/10H (2026-05-17G) and remains public; pricing grid, covenants, and board meeting timing herein are MNPI until disclosure.
Selective disclosure: Wall-cross only under NDA; maintain Insider List per CMA Market Conduct Regulations; no selective disclosure beyond publication on the Saudi Exchange or broad press releases after announcement.
Blackout/Closed Period: No dealings by directors/senior executives from period-end until publication of financial results and while in possession of inside information; proposed board approval to be scheduled after trading hours to meet disclosure timing before next market open.
Conditions precedent: Board approval; EGM if acquisition triggers shareholder approval threshold; lender IC approval; completion of legal/financial due diligence; no CMA objection; obtaining target’s Commercial Register extract and KYC under PDPL-compliant notices.
PDPL/SDAIA: Personal data (including employees’ Iqama/National ID and contact numbers) to be minimized and pseudonymized; any transfer outside KSA to advisors requires SDAIA cross-border transfer assessment and an approved mechanism (or localization on KSA-hosted systems).
Covenants: No dividend distribution by Issuer until leverage <2.5x; Target to enter non-compete; customary representations; no public guidance or earnings comment until Saudi Exchange announcement; no communication with media except through authorized disclosure channels.
Disclosure timing: If Board approval occurs during trading hours, announce on the Saudi Exchange promptly the same day; if after hours, announce before market open on the next trading day; breach may result in CMA enforcement for selective disclosure.
Funding uses: Purchase consideration, fees, and integration capex; no proceeds for shareholder distributions; lender consent required for material disposals pre-Completion.
Outside date/termination: Long-stop 120 days from signing; automatic lapse if CMA or Saudi Exchange objects or if required shareholder approval is not obtained; no-break fee absent willful breach.
Confidentiality: This term sheet is confidential and not for onward distribution; except for items already announced publicly on the Saudi Exchange, all contents are non-public and constitute MNPI until disclosed.
Benign note: Al-Badee Supply LLC’s recent press release about extended warehouse hours (2025-02-10G) is unrelated to the Issuer and is not MNPI.
Contacts/Signatories: Mr. Fahd Al‑Omari, CFO (Iqama No. IQ-21-9088-5543), fahd.omari@rimalindustries.sa; Eng. Saleh Al‑Mutairi, CEO, Rimal Industries; Dr. Layla Al‑Suwailem, MD, Nourah Capital; legal@rimalindustries.sa.
